subcodes.first_line: His mention hath been made before the Face, and We have made mention of him in such wise as to cause the ocean of utterance to surge in the Kingdom of exposition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر ذکره لدی الوجه و ذکرناه بما تهیج به بحر البیان فی ملکوت التبیان و
